headline: Morgan Stanley Keeps Equal Weight Rating on VICI Properties (VICI)
summary: VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) is one of the 8 Worst Blue Chip Stocks to Buy Now. On July 8, 2026, Morgan Stanley lowered the firm’s price target on VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) to $31 from $38 and kept an Equal Weight rating on the shares. On June 25, RBC Capital analyst Brad Heffern initiated coverage […]

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on VICI Properties, Lowers Price Target to $27
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst John Kilichowski   maintains VICI Properties (NYSE:VICI) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $29 to $27.
